data.body: 5967 RED oracle: 46/46 authored tests failed for missing behavior (not collection/import mistakes). Coverage: reducer phase lifecycle + legacy snapshot bootstrap/fork control; manifest/sidecar strict grammar and legacy compatibility; compute_validity phase matrix + completion isolation; execution Pass-3 floor/advisory control; closed/open workflow schema and both YAML decide branches. Gate target: focused pytest, make check, full default suite. Edge/contract oracle physically moved outside the implementation worktree; implementer receives only tests/unit/test_plan_review_phase_happy.py.
